title: Garlicky Irish Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew originating from Ireland, made with tender potatoes and infused with the richness of garlic.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add the diced potatoes and carrots, and cook for 5 minutes.
Pour in 2 cups of vegetable broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 20-25 minutes or until the potatoes are tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
